info.title: config2json
info.description: A simple tool for migrating a web.config/app.config file to an appsettings.json file

hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: CommandLineApplication.Parse, OK: CommandLineApplication.Execute, OK: CommandLineApplication.ExecuteAsync, OK: CommandLineApplication.ctor(), OK: CommandLineApplication.ctor(IConsole), OK: CommandLineApplication.ctor(IConsole, String), OK: CommandLineApplication.ctor(IHelpTextGenerator, IConsole, String))

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: Converts a web.config/app.config file to an appsettings.json file

arguments.name: path
arguments.description: Path to the file or directory to migrate

arguments.name: prefix
arguments.description: If provided, an additional namespace to prefix on generated keys
